description: v6 SDK eligibility checking API for all payment methods

v6_pattern.component_loading: Dynamic component loading based on eligibility
v6_pattern.availability: Explicit API call with real-time results
v6_pattern.method: Async function call with context parameters

countryCode.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code for customer location

paypal.availability: Available in most countries and currencies

country_specific.example: const methods = await sdkInstance.findEligibleMethods({ currencyCode: 'USD', countryCode: 'US' });

vault_eligibility.example: const methods = await sdkInstance.findEligibleMethods({ currencyCode: 'USD', paymentFlow: 'VAULT_WITHOUT_PAYMENT' });
vault_eligibility.description: Check eligibility for save payment functionality

check_specific_method.description: Check if specific payment method is available

get_method_details.description: Get configuration details for payment method

countryCode.description: Country code for PayPal Credit availability
countryCode.usage: Required for PayPal Credit button configuration

paypal.FUNDING.PAYPAL.migration: Replace constant check with API call

paypal.FUNDING.VENMO.migration: Replace constant check with API call + geographic validation

paypal.FUNDING.PAYLATER.migration: Replace constant check with API call + detail extraction

paypal.FUNDING.CREDIT.migration: Replace constant check with API call + detail extraction

NETWORK_ERROR.description: Failed to check eligibility due to network issues
NETWORK_ERROR.retry: Implement retry logic with exponential backoff

INVALID_CURRENCY.fallback: Default to USD and show PayPal
INVALID_CURRENCY.validation: Validate currency codes before API call

TIMEOUT.fallback: Show PayPal button as safe default

best_practices: Always call findEligibleMethods() before showing payment buttons
Cache eligibility results for session duration to avoid repeated calls
Provide PayPal as fallback when other methods unavailable
Handle eligibility API errors gracefully with defaults
Check method details for configuration requirements
Validate currency and country codes before API calls
Show loading states while checking eligibility
Test eligibility with different geographic locations
Update UI dynamically based on eligibility results
Log eligibility results for debugging and analytics

caching.duration: Valid until page reload or SDK re-initialization
caching.invalidation: Re-check if currency or country changes

parallel_loading.sdk_init: Check eligibility immediately after SDK initialization
parallel_loading.button_setup: Setup buttons in parallel based on eligibility results
parallel_loading.lazy_loading: Only load components for eligible methods

timeout_handling.fallback_display: Show default PayPal button if timeout occurs
